summary: Alfred codebase is well-maintained with minimal dead code. All Rust source files are imported and actively used. No orphaned files, no zombie dependencies, and no feature flags detected. Recent cleanup (6207007: 'clean(alfred-core): remove unused facade functions') demonstrates active maintenance. Only minor dead code patterns detected: one test-only import and some unused match arms.

unused_exports.name: clear_panel_cache
unused_exports.reason: Function defined and exported but only used in #[cfg(test)] module

dead_code_summary.assessment: Clean codebase with active imports and minimal cruft. No unused Cargo dependencies. No commented-out production code blocks (test code appropriately marked with #[cfg(test)]).

bridge_primitives.pattern: register_* functions called from main.rs composition root

cargo_analysis.workspace_structure: 6-crate workspace (alfred-core, alfred-syntax, alfred-lisp, alfred-plugin, alfred-tui, alfred-bin)

declared_vs_used.alfred-core: all submodules imported (buffer, cursor, viewport, editor_state, facade, handlers, hook, key_event, panel, text_object, theme, command, error)
declared_vs_used.external_deps: All production deps used: ropey, crossterm, ratatui, rust_lisp, tree-sitter-*, streaming-iterator, thiserror

dev_only_dependencies.name: tempfile
dev_only_dependencies.used_in: unit test fixtures across all crates

patterns: Test utilities co-located with source (fixtures in same file)

plugins: rainbow-csv (1410 lines, active, uses rainbow_csv core module)
plugin_system_analysis.plugin_loading: Discovery via directory scan in plugin discovery module (active)

known_issues.note: 6882 lines; large but not dead — actively used in event loop. Candidate for future refactoring (input state machine already extracted to input.rs)
5669 lines; all functions called from main.rs composition root. Not dead.
2652 lines; aggregates subsystems but all fields actively used. Refactoring opportunity (facade already provides abstraction boundary).

recent_cleanup_indicators.assessment: Codebase actively maintained with cleanup passes. Demonstrates good hygiene.

recommendations.title: Consider extracting key parts of app.rs for better testability
recommendations.description: While not dead code, the 6882-line app.rs file combines event loop with input state machine. Consider extracting more logic into pure functions (input state machine was already extracted to input.rs). This improves testability, not deadness.

recommendations.title: Verify panel module test-only exports
recommendations.description: Confirm that clear_panel_cache is only used in tests. If it's never called in production, consider marking as test-only with #[cfg(test)] or documenting its test-only purpose.
